name: Cobo
description: Digital asset custody platform offering full custody, MPC and hybrid wallets with DeFi and exchange connectivity via API.

seo.title: Cobo — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Cobo: Digital asset custody platform offering full custody, MPC and hybrid wallets with DeFi and exchange connectivity via API.

when_to_use: MPC wallet custody API for institutional crypto asset management
Multi-sig approval workflows for treasury operations
DeFi transaction co-signing with policy-based controls
Exchange connectivity for OTC desk settlement
HSM-backed key management for crypto custodians

pros: Custody, MPC, and exchange APIs under one roof
SOC 2 + insurance coverage for held assets
Webhook and REST APIs suit dev integrations
cons: Crypto-specific, not a general secrets tool
Custody fees and minimums add up fast
review.verdict: A serious crypto custody and wallet stack, but miscategorized as general secrets management.
review.best_for: Fintech and Web3 teams needing institutional digital-asset custody with APIs.
review.not_for: Teams wanting a generic secrets vault for API keys and certs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
